data.text/markdown:
Install Qiskit and co.

Install following packages (using pip or uv):
  • qiskit[all]
  • pylatexenc (for drawing circuits)
  • matplotlib (for drawing circuits)
  • qiskit_ibm_runtime (for simulation via IBM)
Marimo requires a few more package like: marimo, ipython, seaborn, sympy etc. But since this file uses PEP723 with uv, all of this will be auto installed when ran with: 
uvx marimo edit *.py --sandbox
Create and Draw a Quantum Circuit

data.text/html:
┌───┐     
q_0: ┤ H ├──■──
     └───┘┌─┴─┐
q_1: ─────┤ X ├
          └───┘

data.text/markdown: Parametric and Controlled Quantum Gates
Statevector Simulation
Unitary Matrix for the Circuit

data.text/html: $$ \begin{bmatrix} \frac{\sqrt{2}}{2} & \frac{\sqrt{2}}{2} & 0 & 0 \ 0 & 0 & \frac{\sqrt{2}}{2} & - \frac{\sqrt{2}}{2} \ 0 & 0 & \frac{\sqrt{2}}{2} & \frac{\sqrt{2}}{2} \ \frac{\sqrt{2}}{2} & - \frac{\sqrt{2}}{2} & 0 & 0 \ \end{bmatrix} $$
$$ \begin{bmatrix} 1 & 0 \ 0 & -1 \ \end{bmatrix} $$
